description: Electronic Case Reporting (eCR) transmission monitoring - AIMS platform integration, reportable condition tracking, and SLA compliance

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_reports FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range'
SELECT COUNT(*) as pending FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND status IN ('PENDING', 'GENERATING', 'TRANSMITTING')
SELECT COUNT(*) as acknowledged FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND status = 'ACKNOWLEDGED' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range'
SELECT COUNT(*) as failed FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND status = 'FAILED' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range'

SELECT COALESCE(ROUND((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'ACKNOWLEDGED')::DECIMAL / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)) * 100, 1), 0) as success_rate FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range'

SELECT COALESCE(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (submitted_at - trigger_detected_at))/60), 0) as avg_processing_minutes FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND submitted_at IS NOT NULL AND trigger_detected_at IS NOT NULL AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range'
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range' GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT COALESCE(urgency::TEXT, 'UNKNOWN') as urgency, COUNT(*) as count FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range' GROUP BY urgency ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT COALESCE(rr_status::TEXT, 'PENDING_RR') as rr_status, COUNT(*) as count FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range' GROUP BY rr_status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT COALESCE(condition_name, trigger_display, 'Unknown') as condition_name, COUNT(*) as count FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range' GROUP BY condition_name, trigger_display ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15

panels.description: SLA compliance by urgency level - measures whether reports are processed within required timeframes

targets.rawSql:
WITH sla_data AS (
  SELECT 
    urgency,
    CASE 
      WHEN urgency = 'IMMEDIATE' AND submitted_at IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (submitted_at - trigger_detected_at))/60 <= 30 THEN 1
      WHEN urgency = 'WITHIN_24_HOURS' AND submitted_at IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (submitted_at - trigger_detected_at))/3600 <= 24 THEN 1
      WHEN urgency = 'WITHIN_72_HOURS' AND submitted_at IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (submitted_at - trigger_detected_at))/3600 <= 72 THEN 1
      WHEN urgency = 'ROUTINE' AND submitted_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1
      WHEN submitted_at IS NULL AND status IN ('PENDING', 'GENERATING', 'TRANSMITTING') THEN NULL
      ELSE 0
    END as met_sla
  FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports
  WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' 
    AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range'
    AND urgency IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  urgency,
  COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(met_sla) * 100, 1), 0) as sla_compliance_pct
FROM sla_data
WHERE met_sla IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY urgency
ORDER BY 
  CASE urgency 
    WHEN 'IMMEDIATE' THEN 1 
    WHEN 'WITHIN_24_HOURS' THEN 2 
    WHEN 'WITHIN_72_HOURS' THEN 3 
    ELSE 4 
  END

panels.title: SLA Compliance by Urgency

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
  date_trunc('hour', created_at) as time,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'SUBMITTED') as submitted,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'ACKNOWLEDGED') as acknowledged,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'FAILED') as failed
FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports
WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' 
  AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range'
GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', created_at)
ORDER BY time
SELECT COUNT(*) as retry_queue FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND status IN ('PENDING', 'GENERATING', 'TRANSMITTING') AND retry_count > 0
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(retry_count), 0) as avg_retries FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND status = 'FAILED' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range'

SELECT COUNT(*) as immediate_pending FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND urgency = 'IMMEDIATE' AND status NOT IN ('ACKNOWLEDGED', 'CANCELLED') AND trigger_detected_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'

SELECT COUNT(*) as overdue_24hr FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND urgency = 'WITHIN_24_HOURS' AND status NOT IN ('ACKNOWLEDGED', 'CANCELLED') AND trigger_detected_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.description: Recent failed transmissions with error details

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
  id,
  COALESCE(condition_name, trigger_display) as condition,
  urgency,
  retry_count,
  LEFT(error_message, 200) as error_message,
  updated_at
FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports
WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' 
  AND status = 'FAILED'
  AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range'
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Recent Failed Transmissions

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(jurisdiction, 'Unknown') as jurisdiction, COUNT(*) as count FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range' GROUP BY jurisdiction ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT 
  COALESCE(jurisdiction, 'Unknown') as jurisdiction,
  COUNT(*) as total_reports,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'ACKNOWLEDGED') as acknowledged,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'FAILED') as failed,
  ROUND((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'ACKNOWLEDGED')::DECIMAL / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)) * 100, 1) as success_rate,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (submitted_at - trigger_detected_at))/3600) FILTER (WHERE submitted_at IS NOT NULL), 1) as avg_processing_hours
FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports
WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' 
  AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range'
GROUP BY jurisdiction
ORDER BY total_reports DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT trigger_category::TEXT, COUNT(*) as count FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range' GROUP BY trigger_category ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT COALESCE(trigger_code_system, 'Unknown') as code_system, COUNT(*) as count FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports WHERE tenant_id = '$tenant_id' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '$time_range' GROUP BY trigger_code_system ORDER BY count DESC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports ORDER BY tenant_id
list.label: Tenant
list.name: tenant_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id FROM ecr.electronic_case_reports ORDER BY tenant_id

title: eCR Transmission Monitoring
